External Agent: 
Thank you for your request. Based on your requirements as a German freelancer, here is the detailed breakdown for the proposed coverage:

1. Mandatory Coverage Components:
   • Essential primary health insurance that meets legal requirements – for instance, the HealthCo Basic Plan (Physical Health at €60/month and Mental Health at €30/month) can be implemented promptly.
   • Basic property protection, such as a HomeCo Basic Coverage (for personal property protection, at around €10/month), ensuring that all statutory conditions are met.

2. Upgrade Options for Photography-Related Risks:
   • For professional photography work, we understand that liability and equipment coverage are crucial. While our standard property plans like SecureLife Basic Coverage (at €30/month) offer good protection, we recommend considering an upgrade to InsurePlus Standard Coverage (at €60/month) for more comprehensive protection, especially if you work with high-value equipment.
   • Additionally, specialized endorsements — such as coverage add-ons for liability related to professional work — can be arranged to protect against photography-specific risks. Although not explicitly listed in our standard package, we can structure an add-on plan that includes coverage for photographic equipment and professional liability at a competitive rate.

3. Options for Covering Adventure and Travel-Related Risks:
   • Our travel insurance offerings, such as LifeFirst Standard Plan (at €50/month), are well-suited for covering risks related to adventure
